title: Heart Of A King

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Words overflow like rivers from my heart
A story of the King, where do I start?
My tongue becomes the writer's ready pen
To speak of grace and glory once again

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: More beautiful than all the sons of men
Grace flows from lips that speak again and again

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ride on in splendor, mighty One
Truth and mercy lead You on
Gird Your sword upon Your thigh
Justice reigns, Your arrow flies
Your throne endures through endless days
Kingdom built on righteous ways

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Your robes are fragrant with sweet mystery
Myrrh, aloes, cassia from ivory
From palaces where strings make melody
Daughters of kings stand in their majesty

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Let beauty fade and glory pass away
But righteousness will triumph come what may
The ancient words still echo through the years
A love that conquers all our doubts and fears

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ride on in splendor, mighty One
Truth and mercy lead You on
Gird Your sword upon Your thigh
Justice reigns, Your arrow flies
Your throne endures through endless days
Kingdom built on righteous ways
Through generations we will speak Your name
Your memory carried on through endless fame
The nations rise to bless You as their King
While heaven and earth forever praise and sing

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ride on in splendor, mighty One
Truth and mercy lead You on
Gird Your sword upon Your thigh
Justice reigns, Your arrow flies
Your throne endures through endless days
Kingdom built on righteous ways

epigraph: my tongue is the pen of a ready writer
